installNotes: @executeautomation/playwright-mcp-server@1.0.12 depends on playwright@1.57.0 and @playwright/browser-chromium@1.57.0, so it expects Chromium revision 1200.
Pin install to playwright@1.57.0 so the installed browser revision matches the MCP server runtime; mismatched latest installs can create binary-not-found errors.
Playwright downloads large browser binaries. In China/slow networks, keep PLAYWRIGHT_DOWNLOAD_HOST on a reachable CDN.
Keep MCP server install/runtime details here instead of scattering them in TRAE remote-environment UI commands.

mcp-browser.purpose: Browser/UI evidence collection from Evaluator context.
mcp-browser.policy: Project-level policy wrapper over official mcporter. SubAgents must not call raw `npx mcporter call`; they may only call this wrapper with allowedTools.
